evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: trustworthy data and making information findable and useful throughout the organization
evidence.data_team_maturity: Own the dbt project, transforming raw data into staged, modeled, documented, and tested tables
evidence.jd_authorship: Own the dbt project, transforming raw data into staged, modeled, documented, and tested tables across bronze, silver, and gold layers
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Build and maintain semantic layers powering self-serve and agentic analytics

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: trustworthy data and making information findable and useful throughout the organization
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: JD emphasizes data quality, testing, documentation, monitoring, and reliability with no velocity signals.
domain_risk_reasoning: B2B telecom/SaaS company with no explicit regulatory, compliance, or financial reporting language despite sector.
data_team_maturity_quote: Own the dbt project, transforming raw data into staged, modeled, documented, and tested tables
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Existing named tools and infrastructure appear in responsibilities indicating an established function that is growing and being enhanced.
jd_authorship_quote: Own the dbt project, transforming raw data into staged, modeled, documented, and tested tables across bronze, silver, and gold layers
jd_authorship_reasoning: Multiple bullets contain technically specific tools, architecture patterns, and precise operational context; you can clearly picture what this person does on a Tuesday.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Build and maintain semantic layers powering self-serve and agentic analytics
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The role's primary focus is building data infrastructure and platforms for internal analytics consumers, not commercial, product, or finance stakeholders.
autonomy_level_quote: Design and evolve data marts encoding Telavox business logic
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role designs and owns the data architecture rather than executing scoped work, with strategic responsibility for how analytics is delivered.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Design and evolve data marts; Build and maintain semantic layers
ai_role_quote: Build and maintain semantic layers powering self-serve and agentic analytics
ai_role_reasoning: Builds semantic infrastructure consumed by agentic (AI-driven) analytics.
testing_framing_quote: Own the dbt project, transforming raw data into staged, modeled, documented, and tested tables
testing_framing_reasoning: Owns testing and documentation as part of core dbt project responsibility.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: trustworthy data and making information findable and useful throughout the organization
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Trust and data reliability dominate framing as primary organizational concern, not just delivery.
